news.summary: BlackRock's exchange-traded fund (ETF) is close to reaching a milestone of $70 billion in assets, indicating strong investor interest. The dominance of large investors in Bitcoin transactions remains evident, underscoring the trend towards institutional involvement in the cryptocurrency market.
news.headline: BlackRock ETF acquires 3.25% of Bitcoin supply as 'new money' slows, nears $70B mark with large investor dominance.

news.summary: In Detroit, Ernst & Young LLP (EY US) revealed that Anthony Ahee, the CEO of Together Women’s Health (TWH), has been honored as an Entrepreneur Of The Year 2025 Michigan and Northwest Ohio Award recipient. Entrepreneur Of The Year recognizes outstanding entrepreneurs and leaders of fast-growing companies. EY US has been acknowledging visionary entrepreneurs for four decades, highlighting their role in industry transformation, community impact, and value creation. Anthony emerged as a standout in the selection process.
news.headline: Anthony Ahee, CEO of Together Women’s Health, named Entrepreneur Of The Year 2025 Michigan and Northwest Ohio award winner by EY US. Celebrating 40 years of ambitious entrepreneurs.

news.summary: The market is witnessing growth primarily due to the expansion of cold chain infrastructure, integration of Internet of Things (IoT) technology, increasing regulatory compliance demands, and a strong emphasis on ensuring food safety. As per the report released on June 20, 2025, in REDDING, Calif., these factors are propelling the Time Temperature Indicator Market. The report covers various technologies used in this market segment. This comprehensive analysis sheds light on the significant impact of these trends on the market landscape.
news.headline: Time Temperature Indicator market to reach $1.57 billion by 2035, growing at 6.2% CAGR from 2025, driven by cold chain expansion and focus on food safety.

news.summary: ITT Inc. has revealed that its business executives will be showcasing VIDAR, a groundbreaking compact motor, at two notable events happening next week in Stamford, Connecticut.
news.headline: ITT to present revolutionary compact motor, VIDAR, at two events - VIDAR Unveiled Launch Event and Downstream USA 2025 keynote presentation.

news.summary: The potential of democratizing property ownership through blockchain technology is facing a hurdle. To protect digital assets and achieve true democratization of ownership, it is crucial to incorporate automated succession protocols that are native to blockchain. This step is essential in safeguarding assets and enabling broader ownership of real-world assets (RWAs).
news.headline: Issues arise in succession within tokenized property as death, divorce, and lost keys pose obstacles. Implementing automated blockchain succession protocols is critical for safeguarding digital assets and ensuring genuine democratization of RWA ownership.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE:PRT) announced its monthly cash distribution for record holders of Trust Units as of June 30, 2025. The distribution will be payable on July 15, 2025. This news comes as the Trust continues to provide returns to investors through its distributions.
news.headline: PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE:PRT) announces monthly cash distribution to record holders on June 30, payable on July 15.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, in Delray Beach, Florida, a report was released about the Industrial Cleaning Solvents Market. This report covers various applications such as General & Medical Device Cleaning, Metal Cleaners, Disinfectants, and different end-use industries including Manufacturing and Commercial Offices, Healthcare, Retail & Food Service. The market analysis outlines key regions and their impact on the industry. The report provides valuable insights into the market, with emphasis on crucial data and statistics pertaining to market size, growth trends, and revenue generated by the industry.
news.headline: Industrial Cleaning Solvents Market expected to reach $1.55 billion by 2030 per exclusive report by MarketsandMarkets™.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Madrigal Pharmaceuticals, Inc. revealed that the CHMP of the EMA has given a positive opinion endorsing the approval of resmetirom (Rezdiffra) for treating adults with noncirrhotic MASH accompanied by moderate to advanced liver fibrosis. This biopharmaceutical company, listed as MDGL on the NASDAQ, specializes in developing innovative treatments for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH). The European Commission is expected to make a decision on this in August.
news.headline: Madrigal Pharmaceuticals' Resmetirom receives positive CHMP opinion for MASH treatment. Decision expected in August.

news.summary: Evolent Health, Inc. announces better-than-expected oncology cost trends, reiterates Q2 2025 Adjusted EBITDA guidance of $33M - $40M and full-year guidance of $135M - $165M. The company also secures non-dilutive financing with Ares Management Credit funds to address 2025 Convertible Notes and support accelerating organic growth pipeline. CEO Seth Blackley anticipates an increase in revenue bookings for 2026, showing confidence in meeting or exceeding expectations set for the year. The availability of additional capital ensures execution of higher growth forecasts.
news.headline: Evolent Health reiterates Q2 & full year Adjusted EBITDA guidance, secures financing. On track for revenue forecast, potential for increased growth.

news.summary: The President and CEO of Bombardier, Eric Martel, along with the President and CEO of Saab, Micael Johansson, were present at the Paris Air Show in 2025. The event brought together leaders from various sectors to showcase cutting-edge technologies and developments in the aviation industry. Notable participants included key figures like Martel and Johansson, highlighting the importance of collaboration and innovation in the field. The Paris Air Show in 2025 attracted a significant number of industry professionals, with attendees and exhibitors numbering in the thousands. It served as a platform for networking, sharing insights, and discussing future opportunities within the global aviation market.
news.headline: Bombardier Defense gets order for 2 Global 6500 Aircraft from Saab. CEO's at Paris Air Show.

The announcement was made by the diversified holding company, confirming that $TRUMP can be used on the platform.
news.headline: Hyperscale Data's Bitnile.com now accepts $TRUMP meme coin in social casino; part of diversified holding company (NYSE: GPUS).

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Parataxis Holdings LLC, a subsidiary of Parataxis Capital Management LLC, has finalized a deal with an undisclosed party in Seoul, South Korea and New York. The agreement was made through Parataxis Korea Fund I LLC and its associated entities. This news comes as a significant move for Parataxis Holdings, marking a key development in their business operations.
news.headline: Parataxis Holdings LLC partners with Bridge Biotherapeutics, Inc. to introduce a Bitcoin treasury company to South Korean markets.

news.summary: In Beijing, HiDream.ai has unveiled its latest product, vivago 2.0, an all-in-one AI creative assistant. The tool is now accessible worldwide on web and mobile interfaces. Boasting Six Core Features, vivago 2.0 streamlines the creative workflow with a single click. By leveraging this tool, users can generate artworks in different styles – such as realistic, illustrated, or 3D – by just providing a text prompt. The platform enables effortless style switching, enhancing the creative process for global users.
news.headline: HiDream.ai has launched vivago 2.0, an AI creative tool with 6 core features for generating artworks in different styles, available globally on web and mobile platforms.

news.summary: In Beijing on June 20, 2025, Hexiang Insurance Brokers, part of Yiren Digital, introduced new insurance products tailored for China's growing low-altitude economy. The company has secured numerous deals with businesses to provide specialized coverage.
news.headline: Yiren Digital's Hexiang Insurance Brokers introduces insurance products for low-altitude economy in China, signs multiple contracts.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, Ipsen disclosed that the CHMP of the EMA has granted a favorable opinion for Cabometyx® (cabozantinib) for adult patients with unresectable or metastatic, well-differentiated extra-pancreatic (epNET) and pancreatic (pNET) neuroendocrine tumors after progression following at least one prior systemic therapy aside from somatostatin analogues. This recommendation stems from data from the CABINET Phase III trial revealed at the ESMO Congress 2024 and published in the New England Journal of Medicine. A final decision regarding approval in the EU is anticipated in the upcoming months. The financial symbols for Ipsen are Euronext: IPN and ADR: IPSEY.
news.headline: Positive CHMP opinion for Cabometyx® for neuroendocrine tumors by Ipsen, based on CABINET Phase III trial data. EU approval pending.

news.summary: In Salt Lake City, BRC Inc. (NYSE: BRCC) has appointed Matthew Amigh as Chief Financial Officer, starting July 7, 2025. Amigh, a seasoned professional with over 25 years of experience in financial, operational, and supply chain management in both public and private consumer companies, will be instrumental in advancing BRCC's goals of achieving profitable expansion and enhancing shareholder value. His expertise will be crucial in steering the company towards long-term success.
news.headline: Black Rifle Coffee appoints Matthew Amigh as CFO, bringing 25 years of experience, effective July 7, 2025. $BRCCitions to drive growth and shareholder value.

news.summary: A special tribute event, titled Legends Remembered Live: A Tribute to Yogi Berra, will take place on June 29 at the Yogi Berra Museum & Learning Center in Little Falls, New Jersey. The event will feature a documentary screening followed by a Q&A session. Save the date - June 29!

news.summary: In Woking, England, Linde (Nasdaq: LIN) shared its 2024 Sustainable Development Report, highlighting advancements toward sustainability targets. The company successfully decreased its absolute greenhouse gas emissions by 6.2% from the 2021 baseline, aligning with the 2035 reduction goal. This progress involved various initiatives worldwide, such as procuring 47% of total electricity from low-carbon sources. Linde continues to strive for environmental sustainability through its ongoing efforts.
news.headline: Linde's 2024 report shows 6.2% reduction in greenhouse gas emissions, 47% electricity from low-carbon sources.

news.summary: Blockdaemon recently introduced Earn Stack, an institutional service that provides DeFi yield farming and PoS staking on over 50 protocols. This service is non-custodial, catering specifically to institutional clients in the cryptocurrency space. Earn Stack offers opportunities for users to generate passive income through decentralized finance activities and participating in proof-of-stake networks. This initiative reflects Blockdaemon's commitment to expanding its offerings and catering to the evolving demands of the market.
news.headline: Blockdaemon introduces non-custodial staking & DeFi stack for institutions, supporting 50+ protocols for PoS & yield farming opportunities.

news.summary: In New York, Franklin BSP Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FBRT) made an announcement concerning a private offering through its operating partnership, FBRT OP LLC. The offering involved issuing $107 million in total aggregate principal amount of unsecured senior notes. This amount included $82 million of 8.25% unsecured senior notes due 2030 (referred to as the Fixed Rate Notes) and $25 million of floating rate unsecured senior notes due 2028, with an initial coupon rate of approximately 8.33%.
news.headline: Franklin BSP Realty Trust issues $107M of unsecured senior notes, $82M fixed rate notes due 2030, $25M floating rate notes due 2028.

news.summary: Starting June 20, 2025, customers will have the convenience of shopping via the "Doorzo" platform, allowing direct access to Mercari, Rakuma, and Rakuten Ichiba. This initiative comes through the collaboration between SIG Service INC. based in Kita-ku, Tokyo, led by Zhang Zhang, and the mentioned online marketplaces. This new partnership opens up an array of options for customers looking to explore and purchase products with ease.
news.headline: Doorzo partners with Mercari, Rakuma, and Rakuten Ichiba, enabling direct shopping through its platform, expanding global reach.

news.summary: In Chicago on June 20, 2025, Clarus introduced an updated showroom design and innovative glass ideas, debuting their inaugural digital glassboard at NeoCon 2025. The Clarus showroom, a popular attraction at NeoCon, showcases stylish displays, lively music, and modern products.
news.headline: Clarus reveals revamped showroom at NeoCon 2025, showcasing new glass designs and digital glassboard.

news.summary: On June 20, 2025, in Miami, Arkay Beverages, a leading company in alcohol-free spirits, revealed that their top-selling products, including Arkay Zero Proof Whisky, Gin, Rum, and Vodka, have secured the top spot for sales in their category on The Liquor Mall USA. Consumers can purchase these acclaimed products through the official website.
news.headline: Arkay Whisky, Gin, Rum & Vodka Zero Proof leads sales on The Liquor Mall USA, gaining #1 spot in sales. #AlcoholFreeSuccess
